import{useEffect,useRef,useState}from"react";import{DispatchMouseEvent,DispatchTouchEvent,GetNitroInstance}from"../../api";import{Base}from"../../common";import{useRoom}from"../../hooks";import{LeftSidebarView}from"../roleplay/LeftSideBarView";import{RoomSpectatorView}from"./spectator/RoomSpectatorView";import{RoomWidgetsView}from"./widgets/RoomWidgetsView";import{SellModuleView}from"../roleplay/SellModuleView";import{ItemOfferPopupManager}from"../roleplay/ItemOfferPopupManager";import{GangInviteContainer}from"../roleplay/GangInviteContainer";import{GatheringProgressBar}from"../roleplay/GatheringProgressBar";import{NightSkyOverlay}from"../roleplay/NightSkyOverlay";import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";import{Fragment as _Fragment}from"react/jsx-runtime";import{jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export const RoomView=()=>{const{roomSession=null}=useRoom();const elementRef=useRef(null);// server-driven time-of-day
